description: Originally launched on Solana and BNB Smart Chain in Q1 2022, Green Metaverse Token (GMT) is the governance token for the STEPN move-to-earn app. NOW as a 1:1 GMT price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 GMT gives original GMT holders, users, and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Green Metaverse Token
